subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We'd be happy to schedule a meeting to discuss potential collaboration.

Are any of these times convenient for you?
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please confirm which slot works on your end.

With respect to your request for direct contact details, we do not provide internal contact information. Please refer to our public website for appropriate contact channels.

Best regards
